title: Break Me Down
description: Allows you to break some blocks into their ingredients. Useful for storing the ingredients in more compact way.
body:
![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/JlffOQJ5?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=blueviolet) ![CurseForge Datapack Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1052383?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&label=Datapack%20Downloads&color=blueviolet) ![CurseForge mOD Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1379835?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&label=Mod%20Downloads&color=blueviolet) ![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/JlffOQJ5?style=for-the-badge&label=Latest%20release&color=chartreuse) ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/AI-AI?style=for-the-badge&label=Never%20by&color=red) [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord%20server%20-%20Discord?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=Join%20the&color=royalblue&link=https%3A%2F%2Fdiscord.gg%2FDGVD6wBTDF)](https://discord.gg/DGVD6wBTDF)
# About Datapack / Mod **Break Me Down (BMD)** allows you to craft some blocks into their **ingredients** allowing you to revert some craftings. For example _nether wart block_ -> _9 nether warts_. ## Recipes This datapack / mod adds **19** new recipes that allow you to break blocks into their ingredients. ![Minecraft recipe where amethyst block is an ingredient and 4 amethyst shards are the result](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cfc697c644dbad79b867f61694091629442879d.png) ## Advancements This datapack comes with **13** new advancements that will help you discover new recipes and give you some experience points once achieved. ![Minecraft advancement called "Brick by brick"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d33714ba00356da4c412c21d5c47ebeed0d87268.png) ## Translations Datapack / mod supports following languages: English Polish ## Future datapack / mod support I plan on updating this datapack / mod once new **full** releases of Minecraft comes out. ## Compatibility with Other mods If you want some extra compatibility for blocks or items introduced with **Other mods**, let me know on **Discord** and I will release additional add-ons giving compatibility with desired projects!
